news.t: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs
Global X Launches PureCap[SM] Product Suite to Provide Uncapped Sector ETF Exposure

holdings.infoBox: GXPS is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Walmart stock at 17.55%, Costco Wholesale at 14.41%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 11.49%, The Coca-Cola Company at 10.51%, and Philip Morris International at 9.49%.

overview.description: The Global X PureCap MSCI Consumer Staples ETF (GXPS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Consumer Staples index. The fund selects US companies involved in the Consumer Staples sector. Holdings are weighted purely by market capitalization without maximum weight constraints. GXPS was launched on Jul 22, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
